leadText: Bulletproof (Japanese: ぼうだん Bulletproof) is an Ability introduced in Generation VI. Prior to Generation VII, it was the signature Ability of Chespin's evolutionary line.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Affected moves 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon with Bulletproof are not affected by ball and bomb moves . This even prevents being healed by an ally's Pollen Puff . Affected moves [ edit | edit source ] Move Type Cat. sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon with Bulletproof are not affected by ball and bomb moves . This even prevents being healed by an ally's Pollen Puff .
